_NOTE: Demo instance with fictional parties — Jane and John Example. Built to validate against agreement.schema.json with 0 ajv errors. All values are illustrative; do not use as a precedent.

valuation_date.override_reason: Parties agreed to use the date of the agreement reference.

disclosure_complete_attestation.attestation_text: I, Jane Marie Example, have made full and complete disclosure of all my assets, debts, income, and financial interests, and to the best of my knowledge nothing material has been omitted.

non_disclosure_acknowledgment_by_other_s.attestation_text: I, John Example, am not aware of any undisclosed material asset or debt of Jane Marie Example.

disclosure_complete_attestation.attestation_text: I, John Example, have made full and complete disclosure of all my assets, debts, income, and financial interests, and to the best of my knowledge nothing material has been omitted.

non_disclosure_acknowledgment_by_other_s.attestation_text: I, Jane Marie Example, am not aware of any undisclosed material asset or debt of John Example.

financial_disclosure_attestations.consequences_of_non_disclosure: Failure to disclose material financial information may result in the agreement being set aside under FLA s. 93(3)(a) [VERIFY] and may give rise to compensation claims.

spouse_1.attestation_text: I confirm I received independent legal advice from Counsel A on 2026-04-20 over 90 minutes; the advice covered the legal effect of the agreement, my rights under the FLA, and the consequences of signing.

spouse_2.attestation_text: I confirm I received independent legal advice from Counsel B on 2026-04-21 over 75 minutes; the advice covered the legal effect of the agreement, my rights under the FLA, and the consequences of signing.

spouse_1.attestation_text: I am signing this agreement voluntarily, free of duress, coercion, or undue influence.

spouse_2.attestation_text: I am signing this agreement voluntarily, free of duress, coercion, or undue influence.

equality_of_bargaining_position.assessment: The parties have comparable education, comparable earned income, separate counsel, and have negotiated over a period of months without time pressure.

miglin_stage_2_anticipated_changes.change_description: Either party may experience career changes including promotion, unemployment, or retraining.
miglin_stage_2_anticipated_changes.how_agreement_addresses_it: Spousal support is reviewable on material change in circumstances; both parties have agreed annual income disclosure exchanges to support such review.

miglin_stage_2_anticipated_changes.change_description: Children may have varying education costs as they progress through school.
miglin_stage_2_anticipated_changes.how_agreement_addresses_it: Section 7 expenses are shared in proportion to incomes recalculated annually.

hartshorne_circumstances.why_unequal_division_substantively_fair: Not applicable — the agreement provides for equal division of family property and is consistent with the FLA default.
hartshorne_circumstances.comparison_to_fla_default_division: Equal division consistent with FLA s. 81 [VERIFY] default.

substantive_fairness.acknowledgment_of_setaside_grounds: Parties acknowledge that the agreement may be set aside in limited circumstances under FLA s. 4 / Brandsema / Miglin / Hartshorne and accept this risk.
